MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement Agreement is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Continued To Jul-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Settlement Agreement is continued to July 20, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, on the Court's own motion. The moving party failed to provide a proof of service of the motion or a courtesy copy in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)
